text:
TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: MedPAR (derived) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: This field is derived by accumulating the revenue center total charge amount (REV-CNTR-TOT-CHRG-
AMT) associated with revenue center code (REV CNTR CD) '0277' from all claim records included in the 
stay. This field was new in 2011. 

This field is one of 15 detailed medical surgical amounts. Reference: 

MDCL_SRGCL_GNRL_AMT, MDCL_SRGCL_NSTRL_AMT, MDCL_SRGCL_STRL_AMT, 
MDCL_SRGCL_DRSNG_AMT, MDCL_SRGCL_PCMKR_AMT,
